function.message: I can’t safely complete this yet: I could not find canonical project records in `40_projects/` for either “health baseline project” or “attic rainwater rig,” so there is no verified pair of start dates to compare and no justified deletion target.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system workflow, treated inbox as request not canonical truth, and required canonical project evidence before deletion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requests deleting one of two projects by earlier start date, but canonical project records must be resolved via `40_projects/*/README.MD`. After targeted searches in `40_projects`, neither project name (nor key terms baseline/attic) was found, so completing deletion would require guessing.
